spec.name: A Clearing In The Forest
spec.description: Several trails in the forest intersect here in a small clearing. The dirt seems matted down, and you see many footprints in the soil. Nearby you hear a bird's chirp abruptly cut off in a loud squawk, and then silence. The paths seem well-traveled, the undergrowth matted down and the foilage hacked away to leave plenty of room or a traveller to pass in every cardinal direction, excepting the west path seems fairly overgrown... You feel watched.

extra_descs.description: Cloven hoofs, two feet... they walk erect whatever they are.
